scan_sources.description: Continuous authenticated vulnerability scanning of EC2 instances and container images
Cloud Security Posture Management with CIS and AWS Foundational benchmarks
Software Composition Analysis with LEV/IRV classification
External perimeter scanning for IRV validation
Open Source Vulnerability database scanning of dependencies
Static Application Security Testing for Python codebase

vulnerabilities.title: Port 443 is reachable from an Internet Gateway - TCP
vulnerabilities.description: On the instance [INSTANCE-REDACTED], the port range 443-443 is reachable from the InternetGateway [IGW-REDACTED] from an attached ENI en[INSTANCE-REDACTED].

vulnerabilities.title: Port 443 is reachable from an Internet Gateway - TCP
vulnerabilities.description: On the instance [INSTANCE-REDACTED], the port range 443-443 is reachable from the InternetGateway [IGW-REDACTED] from an attached ENI en[INSTANCE-REDACTED].

vulnerabilities.title: EC2 instances should use Instance Metadata Service Version 2 (IMDSv2)
vulnerabilities.description: This control checks whether your Amazon Elastic Compute Cloud (Amazon EC2) instance metadata version is configured with Instance Metadata Service Version 2 (IMDSv2). The control passes if HttpTokens is set to required for IMDSv2. The control fails if HttpTokens is set to optional.

vulnerabilities.title: Unusual outbound communication seen from EC2 instance [INSTANCE-REDACTED] on server port .
vulnerabilities.description: The EC2 instance [INSTANCE-REDACTED] is communicating with a remote host on an unusual server port .

methodology.detection_approach: Multi-layered vulnerability detection combining authenticated AWS Inspector scans, unauthenticated external perimeter scans, Aikido Security SCA analysis, OSV dependency scanning, Bandit SAST analysis, and continuous AWS Security Hub CSPM monitoring. Pipeline version: vdr-pure-v4.0-release-25.09A
methodology.prioritization_framework: VDR Release 25.09A contextual risk rating: CVSS base score adjusted with N-rating (N1-N5), LEV/NLEV exploitability status, and IRV/NIRV internet reachability verification.

scanning_frequency.sast: On every commit + weekly full scan

requirements_met.description: Adverse impact to federal data rated (N1-N5)
